$comment: lw.PPOCR model manifest schema v1 — frozen as of v0.3.0. Backward-compatible additions only (new optional properties, new enum values). Do not remove, rename, or retype existing fields.
title: lw.PPOCR model manifest
description: Describes an OCR model package: dictionary, detector, optional classifier, and recognizer. Each stage lists one or more backend-specific artifacts (ONNX, OpenVINO IR, or TensorRT engine). The manifest is the single source of truth; applications must not hard-code model filenames.

$schema.description: Optional URI reference to the JSON Schema used to validate this manifest.

schema_version.description: Manifest schema version. Currently only version 1 is defined.

name.description: Human-readable model package name, e.g. 'PP-OCRv6 tiny Chinese'.

family.description: Model family identifier shared across variants, e.g. 'PP-OCRv6'.

language.description: ISO 639-1-style language code for the recognition dictionary, e.g. 'ch', 'en', 'japan', 'korean'.

dictionary.description: Recognition dictionary file (one label per line, UTF-8). Path is relative to the manifest directory.

stages.description: OCR pipeline stages. detector and recognizer are required; classifier is optional.

classifier.description: Direction classification stage (optional). When absent, CLS is disabled regardless of runtime configuration.

file.description: A file reference with an optional SHA-256 integrity hash.

path.description: Path to the file, relative to the manifest directory.

sha256.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 digest of the file contents (64 characters). Optional but recommended for release packaging.

shape.description: Tensor shape as an integer array. Use -1 for dynamic batch or spatial dimensions. Must have 3 or 4 elements (NCHW or CHW).

artifact.description: A single model file in a specific format and precision.

path.description: Path to the model file, relative to the manifest directory.

format.description: Model file format. 'onnx' for ONNX (used by OpenCV DNN, DirectML, OpenVINO). 'openvino-ir' for OpenVINO intermediate representation. 'tensorrt-engine' for prebuilt TensorRT engines.

precision.description: Numerical precision of the model weights.

sha256.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 digest of the artifact file. Optional but recommended for release packaging.

stage.description: A single OCR pipeline stage with an input shape and one or more backend artifacts.

input_name.description: Name of the input tensor in the model graph. Defaults to the framework's convention when omitted.

output_name.description: Name of the output tensor in the model graph. Defaults to the framework's convention when omitted.

input_shape.description: Expected input tensor shape. -1 for dynamic dimensions.

artifacts.description: Backend-specific model artifacts keyed by a local backend identifier (e.g. 'onnx', 'tensorrt'). Each value describes one artifact file.
